settings.guests_only_help: When enabled, logged-in users bypass the landing page and see the normal forum. Install fof/direct-links for dedicated /login and /register pages, or use the '{{ login_url }}' and '{{ register_url }}' template variables in your HTML.
settings.html_help: Paste your full HTML document here (including DOCTYPE html and html tags). Available template variables: '{{ forum_title }}', '{{ forum_url }}', '{{ login_url }}', '{{ register_url }}', '{{ year }}'.
